# BP-76 positive variant: values collected from a map are joined unsorted.
lang: go
file: BP-76-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: range-value
---
package sample

import "strings"

func values() string {
	entries := make(map[string]string)
	entries["first"] = "one"
	entries["second"] = "two"
	values := make([]string, 0, len(entries))
	for _, value := range entries {
		values = append(values, value)
	}
	return strings.Join(values, ";")
}
